tags.name: ProductVariantGroupController
tags.description:
Manages variant groups and their SKUs for V2 products.

<p>All endpoints are scoped under {@code /v2/products/{productId}/variant-groups}.
V1 variation endpoints ({@code /v1/products/variation/*}) are NOT affected.

tags.name: AdminInventoryController
tags.description:
Internal admin endpoints for inventory management.
These endpoints are not exposed to merchant users.

tags.name: InventoryController
tags.description:
Inventory Management
Manage stock levels across warehouses, track inventory movements, and view
low-stock items.
All operations are tenant-scoped and require merchant access.

tags.name: TenantRoleController
tags.description:
Merchant-accessible APIs for roles and permissions within a specific store.

These endpoints are tenant-scoped: the caller must be the store owner or
a member with the CAN_READ_ROLE permission. Admin-only roles and
non-merchant-visible permissions are automatically excluded from responses.

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of customers by joining the customers collection with their orders. Customer profile (name, email, phone) comes from the customers collection. Order statistics (totalOrders, deliveredOrders, pendingOrders, totalSpent, lastOrderDate, firstOrderDate) are aggregated from the orders collection.

When {@code orderDateFrom} or {@code orderDateTo} is provided, orders outside that range are excluded before stats are computed — so all counts and totals reflect the filtered window.

Results are cached per tenant and filter combination for 15 minutes and are invalidated automatically when orders are mutated for the tenant.

parameters.description:
Optional cursor token (ISO-8601) from the previous response.
                          Anchored on created_at when sorting by CREATED_AT; on lastOrderDate or
                          firstOrderDate for those sorts; falls back to created_at for all others.
                          If not provided, starts from the beginning of the result set.
parameters.name: cursor

parameters.description: Maximum number of records per page. Capped at 20. Default is 10.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description:
Field to sort by. Allowed: CREATED_AT, LAST_ORDER_DATE, FIRST_ORDER_DATE,
                          TOTAL_ORDERS, NAME, EMAIL. Default: CREATED_AT.
parameters.name: sortFieldParam

parameters.description: Sort direction: ASC or DESC. Default: DESC.
parameters.name: sortDirectionParam

post.description:
This endpoint:
- Validates email uniqueness before registration
- Automatically assigns the STORE_OWNER role
- Creates a new tenant (store) associated with the user
- Generates an email verification token (random digit format)
- Constructs a verification URL with token and email
- Sends a welcome email with verification details
- Publishes a MerchantCreatedEvent for event-driven processing
- Skips tenant context validation as registration is tenant-independent
- Email verification is mandatory before full account activation

post.description:
This endpoint:
- Uses email and password for credential validation
- Generates a JWT token with user identity and roles embedded
- Token is valid for the configured expiration duration (typically 24 hours or per configuration)
- X-Session-Id header is optional and used for tracking login events
- Skips tenant context validation as login is tenant-independent
- Returned token must be included in Authorization header for subsequent API calls
- Password hashing verification is performed server-side for security
